title: Onboarding Tracker
description: Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

allow signup and login

# Your endpoints + customer list page with step checklist here
